cards.name: Professor Cozmo's Discovery
cards.text: Flip a coin. If heads, draw the bottom 3 cards of your deck. If tails, draw the top 2 cards of your deck.

tests.name: professor_cozmos_heads_draws_bottom
tests.description: Test that heads draws 3 cards from bottom of deck

tests.name: professor_cozmos_tails_draws_top
tests.description: Test that tails draws 2 cards from top of deck
